text.message: Black are u willing to let me have wheat port with u having wood?
i am playing 2 resources here and getting robbed
i need resources from your hand sorry
why tf would you rob  me?
To be fair my game is over
orange is the block, he probably has another city in hand
what?? no black...i am the block
you mo-ron lecturing other people what to block
what is your problem my guy
and you playing like a person without eyes
cannot just have a nice game?
i dont get where all this hate is coming from
i had the weakest setup and you robbed me blind..thats where
well, i guess we can wrap this up, orange has had insane rolls
yeah blame the dice after playing like an i-diot the whole game
of course black wont trade for road
i know you wont because you are a mo-ron
